title: Immigration Entry
scene: 你抵达美国，在移民局柜台入境。

turns.cn: 护照和签证请出示。来美国做什么？
turns.en: Passport and visa, please. What's the purpose of your visit?

turns.cn: 旅游，待两周，这是返程机票。
turns.en: Tourism, two weeks. Here's my return ticket.
Where will you stay? How much cash are you carrying?

turns.cn: 住在曼哈顿这家酒店，现金五百美元。
turns.en: This hotel in Manhattan. Five hundred dollars in cash.
Are you carrying any fruit or meat products?
No, I know those aren't allowed.
Welcome to the United States. Please scan your fingerprints.

title: Customs Declaration
scene: 你填写海关申报单，官员询问物品。

turns.en: Anything to declare?

turns.cn: 有，我带了两瓶本国红酒送礼。
turns.en: Yes. I have two bottles of wine from home as gifts.

turns.cn: 每人在免税额度内，请开箱检查。
turns.en: Within the duty-free limit per person. Please open the bag.

turns.cn: 还有一台旧笔记本电脑，个人用。
turns.en: There's also an old laptop for personal use.

turns.cn: 个人用品没问题，酒也放行。
turns.en: Personal items are fine. The wine is okay too.
Do I owe any duty?
No. Please take the green channel.

title: Student Visa Entry
scene: 你持学生签证入境，官员核实学校信息。

turns.en: F-1 visa? Which school?

turns.cn: 哥伦比亚大学，这是I-20表格。
turns.en: Columbia University. Here's my I-20.

turns.cn: 第一次来美国吗？住校还是校外？
turns.en: First time in the US? On campus or off?
Yes, first time. I'll stay in campus housing first.
When does the semester start?
Next week. I arrived a few days early to settle in.
Good luck with your studies.

title: Secondary Inspection
scene: 你被带到二次检查室，官员进一步询问。

turns.cn: 请坐，我们需要多问几个问题。
turns.en: Please have a seat. We need to ask a few more questions.
Okay. What would you like to know?
Do you have contacts in the United States?

turns.cn: 有，我朋友住在波士顿，这是他的地址。
turns.en: Yes, a friend in Boston. Here's his address.

turns.cn: 这次会待多久？谁付费用？
turns.en: How long will you stay? Who's paying for the trip?

turns.cn: 十天，我自己付，这是银行证明。
turns.en: Ten days. I'm paying myself. Here's my bank statement.
Understood. You're cleared to enter.

title: Bringing Medication
scene: 你携带处方药入境，官员询问。

turns.en: What are these medications?

turns.cn: 个人处方药，高血压和过敏药。
turns.en: Personal prescriptions for blood pressure and allergies.

turns.cn: 有医生证明或处方单吗？
turns.en: Do you have a doctor's note or prescription?
Yes, here's the prescription in English.

turns.cn: 数量不超过九十天的用量吧？
turns.en: It's not more than a ninety-day supply, right?
Correct. I only brought one month's worth.
That's fine. Please keep them with you.
